title: Shiprocket Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Shiprocket Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shiprocket Capital India family as a E-commerce Executive in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shiprocket Capital India:
Shiprocket Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
